title: Fix Mapping Field Auto-Mapping Overwriting Labels for Multiple Fields
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want field mapping to only update the selected field, so that other field labels are not inadvertently overwritten.
description:
Critical bug where attempting to map a source object field to a Salesforce object field caused multiple fields to be auto-mapped and their labels updated simultaneously. This was a blocking issue ahead of a customer demo.

### Root Cause
The listing and update logic on the dictionary page was incorrectly scoping updates, causing batch overwrites.

### Fix
Refactored the field listing and update logic on the dictionary page to correctly scope individual field updates. Also fixed a regression where next/previous object navigation broke.
acceptance_criteria: Mapping a field only updates the selected field
Other field labels remain unchanged during mapping
Next/previous object navigation works correctly after fix
ux_changes: Field mapping now correctly updates only the targeted field. Next/previous navigation fixed.
middleware_changes: Refactored listing and update logic on dictionary page to scope updates to individual fields.
implementation_notes: 3-hour fix. Deployed to both staging and production. Root cause was batch update logic not properly filtering to the selected field.
comment_summary: Waqar reproduced and fixed the issue by refactoring the dictionary page's listing and update logic. Also fixed a secondary issue with next/previous object navigation. Deployed to prod and staging.
